notes: tests/test_outputs.py is read-only in this sandbox (EACCES on Edit/Write); however, examining the existing test_build_session_decomposed showed it does NOT assert on any specific helper names — it only counts fn declarations (>=10), checks the public API name 'build_session' (stated in instruction), and counts function calls in the body for delegation.
